name: libmoox-aliases-perl
title: libmoox-aliases-perl
summary: easy aliasing of methods and attributes in Moo
description:
easy aliasing of methods and attributes in Moo
The MooX::Aliases module will allow you to quickly alias methods in
Moo. It provides an alias parameter for has() to generate aliased
accessors as well as the standard ones. Attributes can also be
initialized in the constructor via their aliased names.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libmoox-aliases-perl because easy aliasing of methods and attributes in Moo.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libmoox-aliases-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libmoox-aliases-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libmoox-aliases-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
